name: Microsoft Solitaire Collection
version_note: Windows 11 Microsoft Solitaire Collection (UWP Store app).

startup_sequence.note: Wait for app to fully load
Wait for new game to deal

launch.method: Use open_app with the UWP URI: shell:appsFolder\Microsoft.MicrosoftSolitaireCollection_8wekyb3d8bbwe!App
startup_issues: Browser tab ad — DON'T close browser, focus back.

klondike.rules: 7 tableau columns, 4 foundations (top right), stock (top left), waste pile.
klondike.goal: Move all cards to foundations, Ace to King by suit.
tips: Double-click a card to auto-move to foundation.
Move Aces and 2s to foundations immediately.
Use H key for hints when stuck.
Press H multiple times to cycle hints.
Single-clicking a card auto-moves it to the best valid position — no need to drag unless you want to choose a specific destination
Clicking a card in a stack (e.g., a 7 with a 6 on it) moves the entire sub-stack together
After a period of inactivity, the game highlights the next suggested move with a yellowish glow (hint system)
Use the 'H' key for on-demand hints instead of waiting for the automatic highlight
When the stock pile is exhausted (empty), click the empty stock area to recycle/reshuffle the drawn cards
Systematically click through all face-up tableau cards after each stock draw to find all available moves before drawing again
Combine visual scanning with clicking — experienced players can visually identify valid moves faster than clicking every card
Move Kings to empty tableau columns immediately to free up hidden cards

ui_layout.stock_pile: Top-left of game area, ~x=350-450, y=300-400 fullscreen.

known_issues: Vision model struggles to read small card values — ask specific questions.
Clicking gear icon opens settings — press Escape to close.
DO NOT declare DONE unless you made 5+ real card moves.
strategy_for_agent: 1. The startup_sequence handles launching, fullscreen, and new game automatically.
2. After startup, use look('Describe all visible cards in the 7 tableau columns.') to read the board.
3. Move Aces to foundations immediately (double_click on the Ace).
4. Look for tableau moves: alternating colors, descending rank.
5. Click stock pile (top-left) to draw when no moves available.
6. Press H for hints if stuck.
7. NEVER spend more than 1 look in a row — look once, then act.
8. NEVER declare DONE until 5+ real card moves made.
